purpose: Reference for the 28 git-* IPC handlers exposing git operations to the renderer: status/diff, log/graph, branches, staging, commit, remotes, stash, reset/revert/discard. Documents the gitValidateRepoPath / gitExec helpers, execFile-only execution, 30s timeout, 10MB buffer, and standard response envelope.
gotchas: All commands shell out to the user's installed git via execFile (no shell)
Repo path validated by stat() before every command — invalid paths reject early
10MB buffer ceiling — extremely large diffs may truncate
patterns: execFile for safety against shell injection
Path resolve + stat validation per call
